# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/providers/roleAssignments
    name: [resourceGroup().name, 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', variables('storageAccountName'), 'AzureFunctionsManagedIdentityAssignment']
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Storage Blob Data Contributor'), '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '*')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2020-06-01', 'FULL').identity.principalId]"

  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/roleAssignments
    name: [resourceGroup().name, 'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/', variables('keyVaultName'), 'AzureFunctionsManagedIdentityAssignment']
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Key Vault Secrets Officer'), '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '*')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2020-06-01', 'FULL').identity.principalId]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/providers/roleAssignments
    name: [resourceGroup().name, 'Microsoft.Sql/servers/', variables('sqlServerName'), 'AzureFunctionsManagedIdentityAssignment']
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'SQL DB Contributor'), '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '*')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2020-06-01', 'FULL').identity.principalId]"

  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/providers/roleAssignments
    name: [resourceGroup().name, 'Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/', variables('cosmosDBAccountName'), 'AzureFunctionsManagedIdentityAssignment']
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'DocumentDB Account Contributor'), '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '*')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2020-06-01', 'FULL').identity.principalId]"
